items.title: Largest Privately Owned Brokerage In The North
items.body: Rooted right here in Santa Rosa, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

sections.heading: About W Real Estate
body: At W Real Estate, clients and their goals come first, without compromise. As the largest privately owned and operated real estate brokerage in the North Bay, the firm pairs deep local market knowledge with the resources of a full-service company — guiding buyers and sellers through every step.

With offices across Sonoma County and a team of local agents, W Real Estate supports residential and commercial clients alike, backed by professional marketing, photography, and a network that reaches well beyond a single listing.
highlights: Largest privately owned brokerage in the North Bay

items.quote: Great Service - I just finished the purchase transaction on my first home and W Real Estate was the listing office involved. The home was a FLIP and was done very thoroughly and with nice taste [...]
I have only extremely positive things to say about my experiences with W Real Estate. Beyond professionalism, comprehensive market knowledge and attention to detail, what sets them apart is [...]

Randy Waller and Mario Tamo were fantastic at making recommendations for work that should get done and coordinating the work getting done so that the house would be perfectly positioned to hit the [...]
